nasb.text: And they were bringing even their babies to Him so that He would touch them, but when the disciples saw it, they began rebuking them.

esv.text: Now they were bringing even infants to him that he might touch them. And when the disciples saw it, they rebuked them.

cnv.text: 有人抱著嬰孩到耶穌面前，要他觸摸他們。門徒看見了，就責備那些人。

ccb.text: 有许多人把婴孩带来要让耶稣摸一摸他们，为他们祝福，门徒看见，就责备这些人。

csbs.text: 有些人把婴孩也带到耶稣那里，好让耶稣摸他们一下。门徒们看见了却责备那些人。
